blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Friday: drizzle, highs of 45°F, winds around 22 mph.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
